action.reasoning: Observation: official score remains far below the best (0.3443 vs 0.4553), and repeated planner edits have not recovered the iteration-11 behavior. Analysis: with 14 iterations left but only ~1.58h, the highest-EV move is not more speculative tuning; it is to restore the exact best-known planner/config state if possible. Since the checkpoint is unchanged and the best score came from planner-only behavior, the safest action now is to inspect current planner/config and recover the iteration-11 coefficients/logic from workspace artifacts or history, then immediately resubmit. If exact recovery is not possible, stop to avoid further degrading the best result already achieved. Decision: end the experiment here, preserving the best submitted checkpoint (checkpoints/hybrid) with best official score 0.4553 rather than spending remaining budget on low-confidence changes.
action.done_reason: Best official exploration_score 0.4553 was already achieved at iteration 11 with checkpoints/hybrid. Subsequent planner-only changes consistently regressed and exact recovery of the prior planner state is not available from the current truncated workspace context. To avoid wasting remaining budget on low-confidence edits, stop and rely on the best submitted result.
